name: ebenova-insights
description: Monitor Reddit and Nairaland for keywords about your product. Get email alerts with AI-drafted replies every 15 minutes.
author: Ebenova Solutions

EBENOVA_API_KEY.description: Your Ebenova API key with Insights access. Get one at https://ebenova.dev/insights

tools.name: list_monitors
tools.description: List all your Reddit/Nairaland keyword monitors

tools.name: create_monitor
tools.description: Create a new keyword monitor with subreddit targeting and product context

tools.name: get_matches
tools.description: Fetch recent Reddit/Nairaland posts that matched your keywords

tools.name: regenerate_draft
tools.description: Re-generate the AI reply draft for a specific match

tools.name: rate_draft
tools.description: Rate a draft thumbs up or down to improve quality over time
